title: Actions
description: Output of concept-actions. Inbound caller->system operations a user or system can perform on the concept.

name.description: Action name (verb). Should be recognizable to users.

signature.description: Function signature with parameters and return type.

requires.description: Precondition. When can this action be performed? Null if always valid.

effects.description: Postcondition. What changes after the action?

description.description: Optional prose description when signature/requires/effects are insufficient.

streaming.description: Optional trait. The action yields progressive output (tokens, chunks) before a final value. Channel-portable: SSE in web-ui, chunked over HTTP, progressive print in CLI.

async.description: Optional trait. The action returns a job handle rather than a result; completion arrives later. Required shape for webhook/cron/event-bus channels.

idempotent.description: Optional trait. Re-running with the same inputs is safe (no additional effect). Relevant to HTTP idempotency keys, event delivery, CLI re-run safety.

requires_capability.description: Optional trait. The capability/authorization a caller must hold to invoke the action. Null or absent when no special capability is required.
